---
name: Bug Report | 问题反馈
about: Report a bug to help us improve | 报告问题以帮助我们改进
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

Please fill this out in English or Chinese.
请使用英文或中文填写。

## Describe the bug | 问题描述
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.
请清晰简洁地描述这个问题。

## Mode | 模式
- [ ] Mock
- [ ] Gemini
- [ ] Agent

## Steps to reproduce | 复现步骤
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior | 期望行为
What you expected to happen.
你原本期望发生什么。

## Actual behavior | 实际行为
What actually happened.
实际发生了什么。

## Environment | 环境信息
- OS: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Python: [e.g., 3.12]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 130]

## Screenshots / Logs | 截图 / 日志
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant error logs.
如果方便，请附上截图或粘贴相关错误日志。
